creator: geniusj@free-bsd.org
text:
The main problem is when you play mp3s with any program except 
for xmms which hasn't done it yet, the box will freeze playing back the last few
seconds of sound over and over again requiring a reboot. I have seen this happen
in amp(from ports) and mpg123(from ports).. mpg123 is more common.. among other
problems, mpg123s quality of playback degrades the longer it runs, as well
as xmms, it starts getting staticcy etc. amp does not do this.

Fix: 

Wish I knew.
How-To-Repeat: play mp3s from the console using sscape0 (usually have to do
it multiple times for it to occur)
